title: Mutual Information: Quantifying Correlation
description: Learn mutual information - the fundamental measure of statistical dependence between random variables that underpins channel capacity and feature selection.
learningObjectives: Define mutual information and understand its symmetric nature
Calculate mutual information from joint and marginal distributions
Prove key properties including non-negativity and data processing inequality
Interpret mutual information as shared information content
Apply mutual information to channel analysis and feature selection
Connect mutual information to Kullback-Leibler divergence
